en-US.name: Chocolate Temper: Bloom Guide
en-US.subtitle: Dew Point Humidity for Candy
en-US.promotional_text: Making chocolate at home? Chocolate Temper reads today's dew point and tells you whether to temper, mold, or dip now, plus your safe working window.
en-US.description:
Should you temper chocolate right now? Chocolate Temper turns today's dew point and temperature into one clear answer - GO, CAUTION, or HOLD - for molding, enrobing, or dipping, so you stop losing expensive couverture to bloom.

You finish a batch and it sets up dull and streaky, or cloudy white patches appear an hour later. The same chocolate behaved perfectly last week. The reason is usually the air: when your chocolate comes out of cooling colder than the room's dew point, moisture condenses and turns to permanent sugar bloom - and that dew point changes with the weather every day.

HOW IT WORKS

1. Pick your chocolate (dark, milk, or white), your work (molding, enrobing, or dipping), and your cooling method.
2. Chocolate Temper reads the live dew point and temperature for your location.
3. You get a single verdict - GO, CAUTION, or HOLD - with the reason, the condensation margin, and today's safe working window.

Under 20 seconds to set up. No account required.

CORE FEATURES

Today's Verdict
GO, CAUTION, or HOLD for your exact setup, plus the why - dew point, condensation margin, and room temperature read at a glance instead of guessed.

Working Window
See how many minutes your tempered chocolate stays workable in today's conditions, with cooling notes so it sets glossy.

Room Profile
Tell the app if your kitchen is uncontrolled, air conditioned, or dehumidified, or enter a live thermometer reading for an exact answer.

PRO FEATURES
Upgrade to Pro for deeper insights:
- Compare every chocolate type and work mode side by side
- Hourly GO-window finder for the next 48 hours
- 7-day bloom-risk forecast to plan the right day
- Step-by-step cooling, demold, and warm-up guidance
- Unlimited batches with a result log
- Bloom and gloss logging that tunes your personal safety margin
- Reminders when chocolate is ready to work

PRIVACY FIRST
- No account, no login
- All data stored locally on your device
- Location is used only to fetch weather data. Coordinates are never stored on any server.
- No tracking, no ads, no third-party analytics

Chocolate Temper provides general chocolate-working guidance based on public weather data and your settings. It is not a substitute for your chocolate maker's tempering instructions or professional food-safety advice.
